title: Project Telos Fourteenth-Wave Lean Replay Rung Claims

claims.text: The fourteenth-wave package adds a bounded Lean replay rung for the Navier-Stokes periodic skew-symmetry proof packet while keeping the continuous periodic integration-by-parts theorem NOT_REPLAYED and the parent Millennium problem UNVERIFIABLE.
claims.falsification: The package is missing, lacks a Lean replay artifact, or claims the continuous PDE theorem or Navier-Stokes parent problem is proved.

claims.text: Elan, Lean, and Lake are available by explicit path in this shell, and the package does not claim globally stable PATH availability.
claims.falsification: The Lean receipt is missing toolchain versions, or the outreach/public copy claims global PATH stability.

claims.text: PeriodicCancellationPreflight.lean compiles with Lean exit code 0 and replays two integer algebraic cancellation lemmas.
claims.falsification: The Lean file is missing, the replay receipt is missing, the command does not exit 0, or the package claims the lemmas prove the continuous PDE theorem.

claims.text: The fourteenth-wave source refresh retains 20 arXiv metadata rows, 16 unique IDs, verifies all three Gather stores as MATCH, and demotes the rows to SOURCE_LEAD_ONLY.
claims.falsification: The source demotion gate is missing, counts differ, store verification does not match, or metadata is promoted as paper truth.

claims.text: The website copy, official-copy scaffold, handoff, and revision queue distinguish LEAN_REPLAY_MATCH from NOT_REPLAYED continuous theorem claims.
claims.falsification: Any updated publication surface collapses the integer Lean replay into a continuous PDE proof or omits the NOT_REPLAYED boundary.

claims.text: The fourteenth-wave content queue includes explicit do-not-post boundaries for Navier-Stokes, continuous PDE replay, source truth, exhaustive coverage, native BuildLang relation receipts, and global Lean PATH claims.
claims.falsification: The content queue is missing or omits those boundaries.
